items.claim: Conor McGregor is returning to competition after a six-year layoff.
items.quote: The return of the MAC after six years out

items.claim: Ryan Gandra's previous win over Jose Bonita is not a strong indicator of skill because Bonita was one of the worst fighters in the UFC.
items.quote: He beat Jose Bonita who I'm I'm not even over exaggerating. He was one of the worst fighters in the UFC when he was still here.

items.claim: Zachary Ree is physically large for the middleweight division.
items.quote: huge as well for the middle division

items.claim: Alessandro Costa possesses elite knockout power for the 125-pound division.
items.quote: Aleandro Costa is a knockout machine. He's one of the most powerful guys at 125 right now.

items.claim: Cody Duran consistently struggles with his striking defense and gets outboxed or caught by big shots.
items.quote: Cody Deran, he's a bit of a victim on the feet. He always gets out boxed or caught by a big shot.

items.claim: Cody Duran has previously been demolished on the ground despite having good wrestling.
items.quote: On the ground, he's got good wrestling, but we've seen him get demolished on the ground, too.

items.claim: Wang Kong has demonstrated the ability to out-grapple high-level opponents like Eduardo Mora.
items.quote: She just outgrappled Eduardo Mora who was like suffocating everybody else with her grappling.

items.claim: Tracy Cortez has shown improvement in her kickboxing over the last few years.
items.quote: I think Tracy Cortez has definitely improved her stand up in the last couple of years.
